name: Tee Box
address: 3202 Marina Bay Dr # F, Kemah, TX 77565
about: Tee Box is an indoor golf simulation venue featuring 8 TruGolf simulators with over 100 courses available. The facility has recently upgraded to the new Apogee system for enhanced swing accuracy and instant feedback. Beyond golf, it offers a range of family-friendly games including dodgeball, bowling, disc golf, baseball, and soccer. The venue operates with a full-service bar, making it suitable for both casual play and social gatherings. It caters to a diverse clientele, including avid golfers, families, non-golfers, and those seeking entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: New Apogee system provides incredible accuracy and instant swing feedback
8 TruGolf simulators offer a premium indoor golfing experience
Access to over 100 of the best golf courses from around the world
Family-friendly environment with additional entertainment options beyond golf

food_and_drink.notes: BYOFood (Bring Your Own Food) is permitted for events

simulator_hardware.notes: 8 simulators equipped with Apogee system technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specify whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, BYOFood (Bring Your Own Food) is permitted for events. The venue also has a full-service bar available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specify exact timing, but typical indoor golf sessions for 18 holes range from 1.5 to 2.5 hours depending on simulator speed and group size.

faq.question: Is Tee Box kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Box is kid-friendly, with children 10 and under included with membership and various family-oriented games and activities available.
